transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY from MT_BILLTO_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_BILLTO_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA  TA,
$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE TA.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA1
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY BETWEEN  MT_ENDCUST_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA  AND KEYS TABLE into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA  TA,
$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE TA.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA WI_KEY WHERE WI_KEY.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=TA.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ) 
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA3
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY BETWEEN MT_SOLDTO_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA AND KEYS TABLE into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA  TA,
$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE TA.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA WI_KEY WHERE WI_KEY.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=TA.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY )
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA2
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY BETWEEN MT_SHIPTO_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA AND KEYS TABLE into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUST_PARTY_HIER_TA  TA,
$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE TA.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA WI_KEY WHERE WI_KEY.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=TA.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY )
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_MT_CR_PARTY_ADDR_EMAIL_PHNE_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the Snapshot dimension data from MT_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHNE_TA_WD0  having transactions into MT_CR_PARTY_ADDR_EMAIL_PHNE_TA

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
WI.PARTY_KEY, 
WI.EP_TELEX_LOCATOR_KEY,
WI.EP_TELEPHONE_LOCATOR_KEY, 
WI.EP_FAX_LOCATOR_KEY,
WI.EP_EMAIL_LOCATOR_KEY, 
WI.EP_POSTAL_LOCATOR_KEY,
WI.SS_CD, 
WI.PARTY_TYPE,
WI.COMPLETENESS_FLG, 
WI.LINE_1_ADDR,
WI.LINE_2_ADDR, 
WI.LINE_3_ADDR,
WI.LINE_4_ADDR, 
WI.CITY_NAME,
WI.STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME, 
WI.COUNTY_NAME,
WI.POSTAL_CD, 
WI.POSTAL_PLUS4_CD,
WI.ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
WI.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME,
WI.ADDRESS_STATUS_CD, 
WI.GEO_VALIDITY_CD,
WI.POSTAL_RESTRICTION_CD, 
WI.TELEPHONE_COUNTRY_CD,
WI.TELEPHONE_AREA_CD, 
WI.TELEPHONE_PREFIX_NUM,
WI.TELEPHONE_SUFFIX_NUM, 
WI.TELEPHONE_EXTENSION_NUM,
WI.TELEPHONE_NUM, 
WI.TELEPHONE_RESTRICTION_CD,
WI.TELEPHONE_STATUS_CD, 
WI.EMAIL_ADDR,
WI.EMAIL_FORMAT_STATUS_CD, 
WI.EMAIL_RESTRICTION_CD,
WI.EMAIL_TYPE_CD, 
WI.MKTG_EMAIL_UNDELIVARABLE_COUNT,
WI.EMAIL_ADDRESS_STATUS_CD, 
WI.FAX_NUM,
WI.FAX_COUNTRY_CD, 
WI.FAX_AREA_CD,
WI.FAX_PREFIX_NUM, 
WI.FAX_SUFFIX_NUM,
WI.FAX_EXTENSION_NUM, 
WI.FAX_RESTRICTION_CD,
WI.FAX_STATUS_CD, 
WI.TELEX_NUM,
WI.TELEX_COUNTRY_CD, 
WI.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
WI.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WI.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
FROM	
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHNE_TA_WD0  WI
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CR_PRTY_ADR_EMILPHN_KEY_TA WI_KEY
ON WI.PARTY_KEY=WI_KEY.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
